page_metadata.biotools__summary: R package for CONdition-Dependent Operon Predictions. It is a tool in R to identify from RNA-seq transcriptome profiles operons expressed in a condition/transcriptome-specific manner, based on a Random Forest classifier.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: R package for CONdition-Dependent Operon Predictions. It is a tool in R to identify from RNA-seq transcriptome profiles operons expressed in a condition/transcriptome-specific manner, based on a Random Forest classifier.
